name: Roasted Olives
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 250 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Place the olives in an ovenproof bowl.
3. Add the zest of one small orange and the rosemary leaves.
4. Drizzle with 1 1/2 tablespoons of extra virgin olive oil.
5. Stir everything together until well combined.
6. Transfer the mixture to the preheated oven.
7. Bake for about 15 minutes, stirring occasionally, until warmed through.
Yield: 2 cups
